channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download Earth 3D Live Wallpaper 2.2.5.0
item.description: Earth and other planets from space are an amazing, beautiful and inspiring sight. Live wallpapers, such as Earth 3D live wallpaper, allow everyone to enjoy this view and make your screen more interesting and interactive. This Earth 3D live wallpaper will give your screen a whole new spin and can turn it into something unique. You no longer need to be an astronaut to view Earth from orbit, all you need is this wallpaper downloaded to your device. Get an amazing view of our planet from...

item.title: Download Document Scanner - PDF Creator 6.9.0
item.description: Sometimes in a day, you need to scan your different documents multiple times. In that situation, if everything is planned, you will definitely not have to suffer any more. But if the need to scan those documents arises one by one, it will definitely be a disaster. To rescue you from that situation CV Infotech brings you a mobile Doc Scanner. This document scanner allows you to scan your documents anytime, anywhere. The application also has some additional features that help your scanned...

item.title: Download CCleaner – Phone Cleaner 26.06.0 build 800011435
item.description: CCleaner is a system cleaning and optimization tool for Android devices. CCleaner for Android allows users to delete unnecessary files, such as temporary files and caches, as well as identify and uninstall applications that are taking up too much space on the device. It also includes a task kill to close running applications and free up memory. This can help free up storage space and improve device performance. In addition, CCleaner for Android also has a security feature that allows you...

item.title: Download Carly - OBD2 car scanner 49.82
item.description: Carly is a mobile OBD2 (On-Board Diagnostics) car scanner application that allows users to diagnose, monitor and repair their vehicles. The application works by connecting to the vehicle's OBD2 port, usually located under the dashboard, and collecting data from the vehicle's computer system. The adapter and app work with Audi, BMW, Lexus, Mercedes, Mini, Porsche, Renault, Seat, Skoda, Toyota, VW and most car brands in the world with OBD2 port. Carly - OBD2 car scanner Features Check...

item.title: Download tinyCam Monitor PRO for IP Cam 18.1.2
item.description: Best Android app for remote monitoring, control and video recording of private/public network or IP cameras, video encoders and CCTV DVRs with over 10 million downloads. Monitor your baby, pets, home, business, traffic and weather remotely and securely. tinyCam Monitor brings the best value to customers. Features of tinyCam Monitor PRO for IP Cam Intuitive interface. H.264 support for Foscam and Amcrest cameras. MJPEG/MPEG4/H264/H265/RTSP for other IoT devices. Supports more than...

item.title: Download Total Launcher 3.4.8
item.description: Total Launcher is a custom launcher for Android devices. The launcher is the interface that controls the home screen, app drawer, and overall look and feel of your Android device. Total Launcher offers a high level of customization and allows users to personalize their device to suit their personal needs and preferences. Total Launcher Features Customizable home screen: Users can arrange icons, widgets, and shortcuts on the home screen to their liking. Themes and icon packs: Total...

item.title: Download Shazam: Find Music & Concerts 16.37.0-260410
item.description: Shazam will identify any song in seconds. Discover, artists, lyrics, videos & playlists, all for free. Over 1 billion installs and counting. Use Pop-up Shazam to identify music in any app - Instagram, YouTube, TikTok... No connection? No problem! Shazam while offline. Features of Shazam: Music Discovery Find the name of any song in seconds. Listen and add to Apple Music playlists. Follow along with time-synced lyrics. Watch music videos from Apple Music or YouTube. Enable...

item.title: Download Web Video Cast | Browser to TV 5.12.12 build 5800
item.description: Web Video Cast allows you to watch TV videos from your favorite websites including movies, TV shows, live news, sports and IPTV. It also allows you to stream local videos stored on your phone. Image and audio files are also supported. Subtitles are detected on the website, you can also use your own subtitles or you can use the built-in search feature of OpenSubtitles.org. Web Video Caster supports the most popular streaming devices, allowing your TV to stream video directly from the...

item.title: Download Background Video Recorder Pro 17.3.97
item.description: This application helps you record videos in the background even when the screen is closed. it has many other useful features, such as: remote camera control with Wear OS, motion detector with artificial intelligence algorithm, baby monitoring, calendar recording and continuous photo capture. You can also control the camera with the volume button or 1 of 3 supported widgets "Big red button" - record video. "Big green button" - motion detection. "Big orange button" - takes photos...

item.title: Download YoWindow Weather - Unlimited 2.58.4
item.description: YoWindow is a unique new weather app. The magic of YoWindow is a living landscape that reflects your real-life weather. For example, if it rains - it will rain in YoWindow. Sunset and sunrise in YoWindow take place at the same time as in real life. But the cool thing is you can roll time forward. Just swipe the screen and you'll see how the weather changes throughout the day. YoWindow Weather Features - Unlimited All the weather at your fingertips. You see the current weather,...

item.title: Download Duolingo: language lessons 6.76.2
item.description: Duolingo is a popular language learning app that offers interactive lessons to help users learn new languages. This application offers many languages for you to choose from, including Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese and many more. This app offers an gamified learning experience with interactive lessons, exercises, and quizzes designed to help users learn new words, phrases, and grammar rules. This app is designed to be easy to use and suitable for people...

item.title: Download Microphone Amplifier 13.1.4
item.description: Are you looking for a sound booster that will turn your device into a powerful loudspeaker voice amplifier? Bluetooth Microphone: Megaphone Voice Amplifier is here, amplifying sound like never before, easily capturing, enhancing and projecting sound. Perfect for many occasions, this feature turns your Android device app into a complete sound amplifier listening device for presentations, assembly or simply enjoying amplified sound from afar. Ready to experience sound like never before?...

item.title: Download AVG Cleaner - Storage Cleaner 26.06.0 build 800011435
item.description: AVG Cleaner is a memory cleaning and optimization application developed by AVG Technologies. It is designed to help users reclaim space on their Android devices by deleting unnecessary files and optimizing system performance. The app can scan your device for junk files, including temporary files, cache files, and outdated APK files, and help you delete them safely. Additionally, AVG Cleaner can analyze your device's battery consumption and provide suggestions on how to improve your...

item.title: Download Email Aqua Mail - Fast, Secure 1.58.1 build 105801619
item.description: Aqua Mail is the right app for all your email needs! Whether it's a work or personal email, a company exchange server, or even a rarely used secondary account, Aqua Mail lets you easily access all your emails from one complete app. edit. No complicated setup required, just enter your email and password and you're done. With flexibility and diverse customization options, Aqua Mail's goal is to reflect the needs of modern users and provide a platform that anyone can tailor to their needs...

Text and Drawings: Your notes can contain simple text enriched with emojis or hand-drawn...

Play games with multiple accounts and keep them online simultaneously for dual functionality and experience! Enjoy more fun! Easily manage multiple...

item.title: Download Avast Cleanup – Phone Cleaner 26.06.0 build 800011435
item.description: Avast Cleanup - Phone Cleaner is a mobile app for Android devices designed to help users optimize their phone's performance and free up storage space. This application provides many tools and features to clean and speed up your phone. One of the main features of Avast Cleanup is the Junk Cleaner, which scans your phone for unnecessary files such as temporary files, app cache, and other junk data. The app will then provide a list of files that can be safely deleted to free up space on...

item.title: Download Australis - Icon Pack 1.73.0
item.description: Australis - Icon Pack is a third-party icon pack for Android devices that you can use to customize the look of your device's home screen and app drawer. To use the Australis icon pack, you need to install a compatible launcher on your device. Some popular launchers that support icon packs include Nova Launcher, Action Launcher, and Apex Launcher. After installing a compatible launcher, you can apply the Australis icon pack by following these steps: Download the Australis icon pack APK...

item.title: Download Volcanoes & Earthquakes 2.23.3
item.description: Volcanoes & Earthquakes shows the latest earthquakes worldwide or just earthquakes near you, as well as quake "I felt it" reports in near real-time. It also shows active volcanoes on a map and as a list, along with volcano news from around the world. You can filter and display data in different ways, for example by earthquake magnitude or age, distance from your location, volcano status, etc. Main features: See currently erupting volcanoes on the map (more than 1600 active and...

item.title: Download Chronus Information Widgets 26.4
item.description: Welcome to Chronus, a versatile and stylish set of Clock, Weather, News, Tasks, Stocks and Calendar widgets for your Home and Lock screens. All Chronus widgets share the same highly optimized backend services, making it the perfect, single replacement for many other standalone widgets on your device. This ensures your system will use less CPU, data, and battery while still providing you with rich information. Chronus Information Widget Features Fully functional Flex, Flex (Analog),...

item.title: Download ISS Live Now: Live Earth View 8.4.6
item.description: ISS Live Now: Live Earth View provides a live HD video stream of Earth from the International Space Station (ISS), real-time tracking of the ISS with interactive maps, and notifications to know when the ISS will be visible from your location. The app also features live astronaut missions, spacewalks, rocket launches, and docking events, plus an immersive virtual tour inside the ISS using Google Street View. See Earth 24/7 – Live HD streaming from space. Follow the ISS in real time...

item.title: Download Bluetooth Volume Manager 3.3.1-rc0
item.description: Bluetooth Volume Manager can respond when Bluetooth devices are connected or disconnected. This app allows Android to remember the volume levels of different Bluetooth devices. Available features: Adjust the volume of music, calls, ringtones, and notifications. Send the media command 'Play' or 'Next'. Open a specific app. Keep the screen on. Prevent volume changes. Restore previous volume level after disconnection. This app cannot "increase" the volume or change the volume if...

item.title: Download PDF Scanner app - TapScanner 3.1.01
item.description: TapScanner is a mobile application that allows you to scan documents with your smartphone camera and convert them into PDF files or image formats. It essentially turns your device into a portable scanner, making capturing and digitizing physical documents convenient on the go. TapScanner Features Scan documents, receipts, QRs and business cards Document Scanner App - Automatic Border Detection Tweak your images with multiple filters to achieve perfection Easily manage your...

item.title: Download SAI: Split APKs Installer 2.2.3
item.description: SAI – Fast Split APK Installer for Android. Easily install APK, XAPK, APKM and split APK on your Android device. Whether you need to install large games, APK packages or .apks files, SAI makes it fast, safe and easy. Key Features Fast APK & XAPK Installer: Install APK, XAPK and APKM formats without errors.
